Transformation Stories

From our coaches' personal journeys to member success stories — these are real transformations powered by FitHub.

FitHub
Trupti Mitesh Patel
🌟 Co-Founder & Wellness Coach — Personal Journey
Phase 1: Healing Beyond the Surface
Since a young age, I battled with a skin condition called Psoriasis. To manage it, I was prescribed heavy steroid medications, which led to significant weight gain and constant health struggles. Despite trying multiple diets, workouts, and weight loss solutions — nothing worked. Then I found FitHub.

Through personalized lifestyle changes, nutrition programs, and consistent coach support, I finally experienced the shift I had been searching for:
  • 15 kg weight loss in just 5 months
  • Improved skin, energy, and confidence
  • No crash diets — only sustainable wellness
Phase 2: Post-Pregnancy Comeback
Like many moms, I went through post-pregnancy weight gain. This time, I knew where to turn — back to my FitHub family. With renewed focus on meal habits, mindset, daily routine, and guided nutrition, I was able to:
  • Lose 14 kg in 5 months
  • Rebuild strength & confidence as a mom
  • Live with joy, balance, and self-love
Today
I'm not just lighter — I'm healthier, happier, and more empowered than ever before. Thanks to the FitHub Community, I've transformed from the inside out — twice. And now, as a Wellness Coach, I help others write their transformation stories too. If I can do it, so can you.
29 kg

Mitesh Patel
🌟 Founder & Wellness Coach — Personal Journey
The Reality Check
Hi, I'm Mitesh Patel, and like many young professionals, I got caught in the fast-paced cycle of work, stress, and poor lifestyle choices. Due to a hectic job schedule, irregular meals, and lack of awareness, I gradually gained a lot of weight at a very young age. Soon, I was diagnosed with early-stage lifestyle disorders — a serious wake-up call.
The Turning Point
I visited the FitHub Community, and that's where everything changed. With the help of:
  • Structured Lifestyle Changes
  • Personalized Nutrition Program
  • Balanced Food Habits
  • Powerful Coach Guidance

I successfully lost 16 kg in just 3.5 months — and more importantly, I gained back my energy, confidence, and health.
Today
I'm living a healthy, active, and medicine-free life. As a Wellness Coach, I now help others take control of their lives — just like I did. If I could transform despite the pressure of corporate life, so can you.

I'm Pratik Thakker. Due to my shift job schedule and poor food habits, I gained excess weight at a young age. It left me feeling low in energy and struggling with multiple health issues.

⭐ Member Transformation — Ahmedabad
The Challenge
I was underweight due to malnutrition and irregular eating in hostel life. My health and energy were low, and I struggled to feel confident in my own skin.
The Transformation
Then I joined the FitHub Community, improved my nutrition and lifestyle, and in just 5 months, I gained 13 kg in a healthy way. Now I feel confident, strong, and full of energy! The international coaches at FitHub guide every day and take sessions about better health and healthy lifestyle.
